framework.name: Visa MCP Server Architecture
framework.description: Visa is hosting MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers on AWS Bedrock AgentCore, meaning their payment integration is designed as tool-callable endpoints for AI agents rather than traditional API-first design. This is architecturally distinct from Mastercard's AP2 SDK approach.
framework.raw_quote: Visa is planning to use Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to host Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools so partners can build end-to-end, network agnostic agentic workflows

source.title: Introducing Visa Intelligent Commerce on AWS: Enabling agentic commerce with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Artificial Intelligence
